title: Smoky Caramelized Spanish Chorizo Bowl
description: A hearty, keto-friendly bowl featuring tender Spanish chorizo caramelized with onions, bell pepper, and chili, finished with a squeeze of lime and fresh cilantro.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the sliced chorizo and cook, stirring occasionally, until the edges brown and the fat renders, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced red onion and diced bell pepper; cook until softened and lightly caramelized, about 7 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic, smoked paprika, and chili flakes, cooking until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Reduce heat to low and allow the mixture to simmer for 3-4 minutes so the flavors meld.
Remove from heat and stir in chopped cilantro.
Divide the chorizo and vegetable mixture among 4 meal prep containers.
Top each with sliced avocado, a squeeze of lime, and a few extra chili flakes if desired.
Seal and refrigerate for up to 4 days or freeze for longer storage.
Reheat in the microwave or a skillet until warmed through before serving.
